title: papaver regium
intro: Papaver regium, also known as the Royal Poppy, is a species of flowering plant that belongs to the poppy family (Papaveraceae). It is native to the mountainous regions of Asia and is prized for its vibrant red and white flowers, as well as its medicinal properties. The plant contains alkaloids such as papaverine and noscapine, which have been used to treat a range of health issues, including insomnia, respiratory problems, and inflammation. Herbal preparations of Papaver regium, such as teas and tinctures, have been used to promote relaxation, reduce pain, and support respiratory health.
